dialogue.text: Hello! 🙂 Let's work together on a deal for these packages, shall we? What are you most interested in?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Hey! I'd like some more firewood to keep my doggo warm. What do you need?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I need firewood as well. We have a large group consisting of mostly senior citizens, including my grandma, so we'd like the firewood to keep everyone warm.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I see. 😮 What are you least interested in?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: We can make do without extra water. Can we trade two waters for an extra firewood package and an extra food package?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: We could do without the water as well. I'm willing to trade you 3 firewood for 3 food and 2 waters
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: We need some firewood too, though! ☹️ Let's try to make a deal that benefits us both! 🙂 Could I have 1 firewood, 3 food, and 3 waters?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I meant I would give you my firewood, what would you trade in return?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Oh sorry for the confusion. 😮 In that case, thank you for the generosity! 🙂 How about if I have 3 firewood, 1 food, and 1 water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I can do that for 3 food and 3 water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I think we're close. Let's shake hands on this: 3 firewood, 1 food for me, and then 2 food and 3 water for you. I'll make sure your food packages have extra doggy treats! 🙂 Is that a deal?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Submit-Deal
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Accept-Deal

dialogue.text: Hey there!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hi! How are you?! You excited for your camping trip??! I sure am ready to go on mine!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am very excited, I'm actually going camping in a week. I drink a lot of water so it's important that I bring a lot. What about you?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I really am! I have been watching the weather and updates about the area I will be traveling to.  They are experiencing a severe drought, so I will be in need of some extra water as well! I planned on staying an extra couple days as well.  There is a stream nearby I believe, but I'm not sure how much it has dried up.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: That's good to hear, you always have to be careful with wild water though, it has all kind of germs. Sounds like you'll have plenty of dry firewood though.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Yes, I would be willing to let you have all the firewood for 2 of the cases of water.  How much food were you needing?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I like your water and firewood arrangement. Can I have 2 of the food since you're getting 2 of the water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Let me think on that. I know there won't be much for berries or small animals to hunt for.  Is where you are going have much available for you to hunt and scavenge for?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: It might but with the summer season hunting isn't exactly legal at the moment. I tend to camp in remote areas so going to the store for more food isn't really an option. I've already let you have extra water so I don't think it's too far of a stretch to let me have some extra food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Okay, I can let you have 2 of the food then.  I do appreciate your generosity on the extra water.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Submit-Deal
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Accept-Deal

dialogue.text: Hello there
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hello. How are you?

dialogue.text: Great and yourself? Ready for this camping trip and take a break from modern civilization?

dialogue.text: I'm doing well. Yes. This camping trip is badly needed!

dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: :) Yes and you know what we are experiencing some difficulty as some people who said initially they were not going to be able to come and at the last minute are saying that they are coming so we are short on the most important items which are food and was wondering if we could speak about sharing items but due to the people who joined late if I can get food and water you can have more wood as none of us know how to really go into the wild and we do not want to turn away our last minute guests, it would be of tremendous help
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm more than willing to help you to the best of my ability. I understand and appreciate the difficult situation you find yourself in. How many packages of food and water do you think you will need for your additional guests? How much wood do you need since you are saying you don't need much?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Thanks for your understanding well I think if possible then to meet the situation then how bout 3 food and 2 water then you get all the wood ? That way you can have awesome campfires lasting through the night, we will be going to sleep extra early to wake up very early so we do not need all that wood, as much as we need food to replenish our energy and be ready for another day of long walks to see as much as we can from nature 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I agree with you that campfires are awesome and I do find them to be be quite useful. I'm not as early of a riser as you are unfortunately! 🙂 I'm willing to accept your offer on food as long as you could please consider my needs for water. I am a very active hiker. While I don't need much food for my hikes I do require a lot of water. I once went on a hiking trip when I was new to the activity and ran out of water. I got lost and almost dehydrated! Ever since then it's been very important to me to have as much water as possible. What would it take in order for me to get as much water as possible keeping in mind that I'm willing to give you 3 food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Thank you for the food and I understand we do have to think about water being by far the most important thing in life since it bascially is right 🙂 and well how about then we go do two waters for you and one wood then so then we can have that wood for just in case and we can all be happy ?? thanks for your understanding
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Yes. Water is the most important thing in life. Thank you for offering me two waters and one wood. However, this would mean that you would be receiving 3 food, 1 water, and 2 wood. That seems too unbalanced to me. It's important for me to also let you know that wood is very crucial for me. When I was a newbie I didn't bring any wood because I figured I'm fine since I'm not scared of the dark. That night a bear snuck on me when I was sleeping. Thankfully I was able to scare it away with noise. However, ever since then I've brought a lot of wood with me so no bears can sneak up on me. I would like to counter your offer with 3 waters, 2 wood, and 0 food. This means you get 1 wood and 3 food. Does this offer work for you?

dialogue.text: Hello, how is your camping trip going?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Hi there.  Hoping it'll be good, and yours as well.  I was hoping we could negotiate so I could get this extra water - I was planning on this being a hiking trip and it's pretty warm and humid out, so I imagine I'll need it.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I don't have any problems letting you have all 3 waters. Would you be willing to give me all 3 firewood? I need extra to keep me warm as I get cold easily.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That's a little tough for me but if we can come to an agreement where I get 2 of the food, I'd be willing to play ball.  We both deserve a good camping trip, after all.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: That's true. We both deserve a good trip. Why do you need more food?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Because I planned to go hiking and it wouldn't leave me time to chop much of any myself.  Even if I did, I'd have to carry it back and that's obviously not very smart in this heat.  But if I had the extra food, I'd be willing to inconvenience myself with getting firewood and cutting my hike a little short because I know the firewood is important to you.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: You're right. I do not plan on hiking so you need more food than me. If I am correct, would I get 3 firewood/1 food while you get 3 water/2 food?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That's what I could live with, yes.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: We should be able to trade soon. I hope you have a great trip!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: You too!  Great birdwatching this season.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Hello! What camping supplies are you looking for the most?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Hello! I would like more packages of food the most. What are you looking for?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I would need water the most as I forgot to bring enough. I can give you all my food for all of you water, if you'd like?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: That would be amazing! So I could take all 3 packages of the food and you could have all 3 packages of the water. Now, we just need to split the firewood. Could I take 2 of the firewood leaving you with 1? I think I would need more for cooking the food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Awesome! That does sound like a deal. I wish we had more firewood to split because I am afraid it might get cold.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I know, it makes it a little hard to split the supplies with only 3 of everything. I would definitely share more if there were more supplies!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I agree. I am feeling generous and I did buy a new axe for this camping trip. So, I could stick to the prior agreement and just work a little harder to find some dry trees to chop.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate your generosity 🙂 I think that bringing your axe would be a great idea! Also be sure to pack warm clothes and extra blankets! I'm sure we will both be fine
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: You are welcome! 🙂 I am happy that we reached an agreement! Did you happen to see any dry looking trees on along your way?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I am also happy we reached an agreement so easily! You are a great partner for compromising! Honestly, I am not sure how to tell if the trees look dry but I would definitely help you go look for some. I will submit our original deal so we can get on with camping🙂🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Thank you! Stay safe out there! If you need anything else, let me know.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: You as well! Have fun!
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Submit-Deal
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Accept-Deal
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

annotations: Hello! I'll be camping soon and need to get my hands on some supplies. The food is what I need the most.

I am not going to give you all the water. I am not backing down on this. What if our fire gets out of hand like you said. I will need at least one or we will not make a deal.
How about this then. I'll give you one food, one water and two firewood.

dialogue.text: Hello, fellow camper.  Are you ready for our camping trip?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I am ready to go camping. I understand there might be some disagreement around the additional supplies we each can choose from?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That

dialogue.text: Ha! That sounds wonderful. When I was young my mother and I hiked 75 miles on the Pacific Crest Trail over 13 days. It was an incredible bonding experience that really raised my level of confidence in what I could accomplish.
